---
description: "Mandatory CI/CD and GitHub Actions constraints: all build pipelines must complete within ten minutes, and agents must research the latest GitHub Actions documentation online before authoring or updating workflows"
applyTo: "**"
---

# Mandatory Constraints for CI/CD and GitHub Actions

- The maximum total end to end duration for all the build jobs, steps, actions and/or flows must not exceed ten minutes in unison.
- The constraint of ten minutes should be memorialized, enforced and instituted through unbreakable non-overridable parameters codified and enforced in the build job itself.

## Encouragement to Research Latest Documentation Online For GitHub Actions

- The services offered from GitHub change constantly and get updated, improved, enhanced almost every week. You have to research online, learn the latest, understand the latest configuration spectrum, and the latest services.
- The images or runtimes that GitHub Actions utilize also get upgraded regularly. It is imperative that you keep the GitHub actions up to date, using the most recent versions and leveraging the most recent capabilities from GitHub.
- Do not assume that your knowledge is current or the latest, or you can figure out the optimal job setup given your pre-training knowledge.
- Always assume that what you already know about GitHub Actions is outdated and not the optimal and not the most performant.
